description: CompositionBlack and white checked shirt, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, tipped collar, buttoned front placket, yoke at the back, contrast stitch detailing, embroidery on the left chest and at the back, patch pockets on the chest with a buttoned flap and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry lowDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsboys will love this shirt from doodle. The cotton fabric will keep him fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts or jeans and comfy footwear for a stylish, casual look.
